title: calpidia oblonga
intro: Calpidia oblonga is a plant species commonly known as the 'oblong leaf calpidia', which belongs to the family of flowering plants. The medicinal properties of Calpidia oblonga include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it a potential treatment for various health conditions. The health benefits of the plant are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of Calpidia oblonga typically involve drying and processing the leaves to be used in teas, infusions, or topical applications.
